David Tran/ham, Chairperson, District Clerk Asltley D'Anna, County Oerk Designee Holly Sad/owski, Commissioners Court Representative Jea1111ie Claggett, Criminal District Attomey's Desig11ee Nick Woltr, Attorney Represe11tative Judge C Tyler Atkinso11,  Mu11icipal Judge Representative

MAY 28, 2026

IT IS ORDERED THAT THE DENTON COUNTY BAIL BOND BOARD ACCEPTED and APPROVED the security deposit on file for Financial Casualty & Surety (FSC), Inc., Agent Jonathan Martinez d/b/a Express Bail Bonds.

IT IS ORDERED THAT THE DENTON COUNTY BAIL BOND BOARD APPROVED the renewal application for Carrie Lea Sanders d/b/a Bail Bond Headquarters (License #20-25-06) for a two-year license.

IT IS ORDERED THAT THE DENTON COUNTY BAIL BOND BOARD APPROVED the renewal application for Allegheny Casualty Company for Agent, Jerry Wynn Dillard Ill d/b/a Doc's Bail Bonds #2 (License #2022-23-06) for a two-year license.

IT IS ORDERED THAT THE DENTON COUNTY BAIL BOND BOARD APPROVED the renewal application for Allegheny Casualty Company for Agent, Melinda Webb d/b/a Webb's Statewide Bail Bonds (License #03-01-06) for a three-year license.

<!-- image -->

Presiding Officer Denton County Bail Bond Board
